task_completion.description: Locate and open the 'Language' menu in the top menu bar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Language' dropdown menu is clicked and expanded in the JStock top menu bar.

task_completion.description: Select 'Deutsch' (German) from the Language dropdown list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Deutsch' option is highlighted or clicked within the expanded Language menu.

task_completion.description: Confirm any dialogs prompted after selecting the language.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A popup dialog (likely mentioning a restart or confirming the language change) is visible, and the agent clicks 'OK', 'Yes', or the equivalent confirmation button.

task_completion.description: Close and restart the JStock application for changes to take effect.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JStock application window is closed (disappears from the screen) and is subsequently launched again (splash screen or main window reappears).

task_completion.description: Verify that the menu items have changed to their German equivalents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The reopened JStock application displays German words in the top menu bar, such as 'Datei' (File), 'Bearbeiten' (Edit), and 'Hilfe' (Help).

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to change the language, not terminal commands or config file edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks on the JStock menus. There should be no terminal windows or text editors open modifying JStock configuration files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard JStock application window with its specific layout, icons, and branding is visible.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the metadata keys to directly inject the expected locale or country codes into the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: No scripts or commands are visible in the terminal that reference 'expected_language_name', 'expected_locale_code', or 'expected_country_code'.
